title: AWSDevOpsGuruResourceCollectionProperties
description: This resource schema represents the ResourceCollection resource in the Amazon DevOps Guru.. Source:- <https://github.com/aws-cloudformation/aws-cloudformation-resource-providers-devops-guru>

ResourceCollectionFilter.description: Information about a filter used to specify which AWS resources are analyzed for anomalous behavior by DevOps Guru.
ResourceCollectionFilter.title: AWSDevOpsGuruResourceCollectionResourceCollectionFilterDefinition

CloudFormationCollectionFilter.description: CloudFormation resource for DevOps Guru to monitor

StackNames.description: An array of CloudFormation stack names.

CloudFormationCollectionFilter.title: AWSDevOpsGuruResourceCollectionCloudFormationCollectionFilterDefinition

TagCollections.description: Tagged resources for DevOps Guru to monitor
TagCollections.title: AWSDevOpsGuruResourceCollectionTagCollectionsDefinition

TagCollection.description: Tagged resource for DevOps Guru to monitor

AppBoundaryKey.description: A Tag key for DevOps Guru app boundary.

TagValues.description: Tag values of DevOps Guru app boundary.

TagCollection.title: AWSDevOpsGuruResourceCollectionTagCollectionDefinition
